nasb.text: Then I sent a message to him saying, “Such things as you are saying have not been done, but you are inventing them in your own mind.”

esv.text: Then I sent to him, saying, “No such things as you say have been done, for you are inventing them out of your own mind.”

cnv.text: 我就回覆他，說：“你說的這些事不是事實，都是你從心裡捏造出來的。”

ccb.text: 我就派人答复他说：“你所说的并非事实，是你心里捏造的。”
